_note: The pull (Step 4 → 5). Curator selects what the public window shows. Add an optional 'headline' to any selection to override the engine's finding name on the public spine. Pradarshan renders only what is listed here, in order. Re-run: npm run pradarshan.
intro: A public window into one reader's library — not the books, but the spines that run across them: the tensions it holds unresolved, the figures it orbits, the collections hiding in plain sight.
